things.name: Sani Pass & Top of the Lesotho Highlands
things.description: One of Africa's most dramatic mountain passes reaching 2,874m on the border with South Africa

things.name: Maluti Mountains Pony Trek
things.description: Ride Basotho ponies through mountain villages - the traditional transport of the Kingdom in the Sky

things.name: Thaba Bosiu National Monument
things.description: Sacred mountain fortress where King Moshoeshoe I united the Basotho nation in 1824

things.name: Katse Dam
things.description: Africa's second largest dam wall - spectacular arched dam in a sheer mountain gorge

things.name: Sehlabathebe National Park
things.description: Remote highland park with ancient rock art and the rare spiral aloe

things.name: Lesotho Highlands Water Project
things.description: One of the world's great engineering feats - tunnels carry water from Lesotho to South Africa

things.name: Basotho Cultural Village
things.description: Reconstructed traditional village showing the evolution of Basotho architecture

things.name: Maletsunyane Falls
things.description: Sub-Saharan Africa's highest single-drop waterfall at 192m near Semonkong

things.name: Maseru Craft Centre
things.description: Woven tapestries and mohair products - the finest arts of the Basotho people

things.name: Papa (Maize Porridge) with Moroho
things.description: Lesotho staple - stiff maize meal porridge with wild spinach and fermented sour milk
